facebook.caption: Tucked along Bãi Khem, one of Phu Quoc's most pristine southern beaches, Premier Residences Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Managed by Accor earns its 4.8/5 from over 8,600 guests for very good reason. Five restaurants, a full spa, a fitness center, and free breakfast included mean you rarely need to leave the property. Practical tip: book a sea-view room early, Bãi Khem fills up fast during peak season (November to April).
facebook.video_caption: Watch the waves roll onto Bãi Khem right from the resort's beachfront, where guests start the morning with a free breakfast and end the day with a spa session. Five dining options, stunning pool views, and soft white sand all in one place. This is what a Phu Quoc splurge looks like.

instagram.caption: Bãi Khem is already one of Phu Quoc's most beautiful beaches, and Premier Residences Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Managed by Accor sits right on it. Rated 4.8/5 across 8,600+ reviews, with 5 restaurants, a spa, and free breakfast. Hard to argue with that.
instagram.video_caption: Beachfront mornings at Bãi Khem, five restaurants, a spa, and breakfast on the house. Premier Residences Phu Quoc Emerald Bay Managed by Accor is the kind of stay you plan a whole trip around.

tiktok.caption: This beachfront resort on Bãi Khem is rated 4.8/5 by 8,600+ guests, includes free breakfast, and has 5 restaurants on site. Phu Quoc is doing something right. #PhuQuoc #LuxuryTravel #VietnamTravel #BeachResort
